case_title: FRANCISCO, BROOK et al VS LAM,DANNY Y.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $682.74 FILED BY FRANCISCO, BROOK FRANCISCO, DEAN AS TO DEFENDANT LAM,DANNY Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
